sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86512" key="proanaisxunte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προαναισχυντέω</orth>, <sense id="n86512.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be shameless on behalf of,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑπὲρ τῶν ἀδικούντων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hyp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Dem.Fr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
